cancel.title: Cancel quote request
cancel.description: The request will be marked as cancelled and the vendor will receive a notification. The associated quote is not modified. This action cannot be undone.
cancel.success: Request cancelled. The vendor has been notified.

errors.QR_NOT_FOUND: We could not find this request or it is no longer available.
errors.QR_NOT_CANCELLABLE: This request can no longer be cancelled in its current state.
errors.QR_HAS_CONFIRMED_BOOKING: Cancellation is not possible: a confirmed booking intent is associated. Cancel the booking first.
errors.AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED: You need to sign in to cancel the request.
errors.FORBIDDEN: Your role cannot cancel quote requests.
errors.UNEXPECTED: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

page.title: Compare quotes
page.subtitle: Review the quotes received for this category and decide which to mark as preferred.

empty.title: You have not received quotes in this category yet
empty.description: As vendors respond to your requests, quotes will appear here for comparison.

table.caption: Quotes received in the {category} category
table.ratingAria: Average rating {rating} out of 5, with {reviews} reviews

errors.INVALID_FILTERS: Select a category to compare quotes.
errors.INVALID_CATEGORY: The selected category is not available.
errors.AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED: You need to sign in to view the comparator.
errors.EVENT_NOT_FOUND: We could not find that event or you do not have permission to view it.
errors.UNEXPECTED: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

preferred.unmarkAria: Remove the preferred mark from {vendor}'s quote

errors.QUOTE_NOT_PREFERABLE: This quote can no longer be marked: it changed state or expired.
errors.QUOTE_NOT_FOUND: We could not find this quote or it is no longer available.
errors.AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED: You need to sign in to mark the quote.
errors.FORBIDDEN: Your role cannot mark quotes as preferred.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: There was a problem with your request. Please try again.
errors.UNEXPECTED: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

create.title: Create booking intent
create.description: Confirming accepts this quote and notifies the vendor. This flow does not include payments or digital contracts.

disclaimer.label: I understand this is a simulated booking intent.
disclaimer.hint: EventFlow does not process payments or contracts. Any financial or legal agreement must be formalized off-platform with the vendor.

create.success: Booking intent created. We notified the vendor.

errors.DISCLAIMER_REQUIRED: You must accept the disclaimer to continue.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: There was a problem with your request. Please try again.
errors.AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED: You need to sign in to create the intent.
errors.FORBIDDEN: Your role cannot create booking intents.
errors.QUOTE_NOT_FOUND: We could not find this quote or it is no longer available.
errors.QUOTE_NOT_ACCEPTABLE: This quote cannot be accepted in its current state.
errors.QUOTE_EXPIRED: This quote expired and can no longer be accepted.
errors.BOOKING_INTENT_ALREADY_EXISTS: An active booking intent already exists for this quote.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many requests. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.UNEXPECTED: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

create.commentHint: Sharing details helps other organizers. Up to 2000 characters.
create.success: Review published. The vendor has been notified.

errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please review the rating and comment.
errors.AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED: You need to sign in to publish a review.
errors.RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND: We couldn't find this event or vendor.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many requests. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.REVIEW_NOT_ELIGIBLE: You can't review this vendor yet.
errors.UNEXPECTED: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

eligibility.title: You can't publish this review
eligibility.no_booking: You can only review vendors you've confirmed a booking with for this event.
eligibility.event_not_completed: You'll be able to review once the event is marked as completed.
eligibility.window_expired: The 30-day window to review this event has already expired.
eligibility.already_reviewed: You already published a review for this vendor on this event.

dashboard.title: Organizer dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Snapshot of your activity: events, tasks, quotes and notifications.
dashboard.error: We couldn't load your summary. Please try again.
dashboard.weekBanner: {count, plural, one {# event} other {# events}} this week
